# task\-audit\-ranking\-generated\-policy — Decide task ranking and generated artifact tracking policy
status: todo  priority: 3  scope: scope-core

Resolve the lower\-priority workflow recommendations after correctness is stable\. Decide whether equal\-priority strategy needs an optional explicit rank and whether generated reports/views should be tracked, optional, or ignored by default\. Record deliberate decisions before adding schema or repository\-policy surface area\.

## Acceptance
- A decision record evaluates priority\-plus\-id, priority\-plus\-created\_at, and optional rank ordering with migration and UI implications\.
- If rank is accepted, TaskRecord adds an optional nonnegative rank and selection orders by priority, rank, creation time, then id with deterministic tests and surface support\.
- A decision record distinguishes canonical JSON from disposable index and generated Markdown and defines the default tracking/regeneration policy\.
- If generated views become optional, sync/report behavior, documentation, ignore rules, and freshness validation agree\.
- The decision explicitly records why no deferred status is added unless todo\-as\-backlog proves insufficient after the readiness correction\.
